findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B referenced for 35+ days with no successor
findings.detail: SPRINT.md references SPRINT-2026-05-B as the active sprint. As of 2026-06-27 this is >35 days old. No successor sprint (SPRINT-B or SPRINT-2026-06-*) has been created. Workers reading SPRINT.md may execute stale tasks or block on completed work.
findings.remediation: Create SPRINT-2026-06-B (or the next applicable sprint ID) in SPRINT.md with current active tasks. Archive or close SPRINT-2026-05-B.

findings.title: All Q2 2026 OKRs missed — KPI.md not updated
findings.detail: KPI.md retains Q2 2026 OKRs with no outcome recorded. Q2 ended 2026-06-30 (or sooner per team calendar). The 'status: skeleton' tag is now misleading — the skeleton was for pre-launch, but launch happened. Untracked OKRs prevent retrospective learning and Q3 planning.
findings.remediation: Record actual Q2 outcomes against each OKR. Add Q3 OKRs. Update status from 'skeleton' to 'active'.

findings.title: Retell R1 milestone 36+ days overdue
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md lists Retell R1 (first real interview run) as a milestone. INTEGRATIONS.md lists Retell status as 'production (pending account creation D2)'. This milestone was due ~D2 of Sprint A, which has long passed. No completion record exists.
findings.remediation: Either mark the milestone complete with actual date, reschedule with rationale, or open a blocking issue in IFleet. Update INTEGRATIONS.md Retell status to reflect reality.

findings.title: SECURITY.md setup step buried — hook activation not prominent
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §13 warns: 'Workers and humans MUST run git config core.hooksPath .husky after first clone for the secret-scan hook to fire locally.' This instruction appears only in the AGENTS.md warning block, not in README.md setup section or SECURITY.md. New contributors and workers starting fresh will miss it.
findings.remediation: Add a prominent 'Setup' block to README.md with the git config step. Add a note to RUNBOOK.md §First-time setup.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md and RUNBOOK.md describe unbuilt Tier 1/2 as operational
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md describes a Tier 1 (voice discovery) and Tier 2 (spec generation) pipeline as if it is operational. INTEGRATIONS.md and INTAKE.md confirm voice-discovery is not yet built. RUNBOOK.md similarly contains operational steps for a system that doesn't exist. A reader following RUNBOOK.md would have nothing to run.
findings.remediation: Add 'NOT YET BUILT — See [M-NNN] in ROADMAP.md' banners to Tier 1 and Tier 2 sections in both ARCHITECTURE.md and RUNBOOK.md.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §2 lists 18 items but claims 17 spec files
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §2 'Required reading order' has items 1–18 but its own inline note says 'the canonical 17 spec files are items 1–16 above plus this file; CLAUDE.md is included here as the Claude Code entry point, not counted in the 17'. Item 17 is AGENTS.md and item 18 is CLAUDE.md. The numbering is accurate; the note is confusing. Workers may miscount.
findings.remediation: Rewrite the inline note after item 18 to make it clear: items 1–16 + AGENTS.md (item 17) = the 17 spec files; CLAUDE.md at item 18 is the entry-point bridge.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md frontmatter last_updated is stale
findings.detail: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md has frontmatter last_updated that predates the most recent substantive content additions (ADR-0011, new domain terms from the June session). Stale frontmatter breaks metadata-driven indexers.
findings.remediation: Update last_updated to 2026-06-27.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md '## Now' section is misleading — no active sprint
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md has a '## Now' section that implies a currently-executing sprint. SPRINT.md shows SPRINT-2026-05-B which is stale. There is no active sprint as of 2026-06-27. The heading misleads workers about current system state.
findings.remediation: Rename '## Now' to '## Planned (no active sprint — SPRINT-B pending)' or equivalent that reflects the actual state.

findings.title: INTEGRATIONS.md Retell lifecycle status contradicts reality
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md lists Retell as 'production (pending account creation D2)'. Day 2 has long passed, account was not created, and Retell R1 milestone is overdue (see AUDIT-factory-4ac993be). The lifecycle label 'production' is wrong; the actual status is 'not started' or 'blocked'.
findings.remediation: Update Retell lifecycle to 'experimental (blocked — account creation pending, see [M-NNN])' or similar accurate description.

findings.title: RISKS.md 14 of 15 risks have no reviewed_at entry
findings.detail: RISKS.md contains 15 risk entries. Only 1 has a reviewed_at timestamp. The remaining 14 show status from initial writing (May 2026). After 5+ weeks of operation, risk status may have materially changed (e.g., R-001 'voice-discovery not built' is still true; R-007 'single-seat Max plan hit' may now be actively limiting).
findings.remediation: Review and update all 15 risk entries with current status and a reviewed_at timestamp.

findings.title: STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log missing ADR-0011 entry
findings.detail: STAKEHOLDERS.md contains a decision log table. ADR-0011 was created during the 2026-06-04 session but has no entry in the STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log. Cross-referencing between STAKEHOLDERS.md and docs/decisions/ is incomplete.
findings.remediation: Add a row for ADR-0011 to the STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log with date 2026-06-04 and brief description.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md index out of sync with docs/decisions/ contents
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md is described as an 'auto-generated index' in AGENTS.md §3. However it appears to be manually maintained and may be missing recent ADRs (0010, 0011). The index and the actual files in docs/decisions/ may have drifted.
findings.remediation: Regenerate DECISIONS.md from ADR frontmatter. Add any missing ADR entries.

findings.title: README.md footer 'Last updated' is stale
findings.detail: README.md footer shows a Last updated date that predates multiple content changes made in June 2026 sessions. Stale dates erode trust in the document's currency.
findings.remediation: Update README.md 'Last updated' footer to 2026-06-27.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md references local filesystem path instead of GitHub URL
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md contains a reference to '~/dev/IFleet/SPRINT.md' (a local filesystem path). This path is not valid for any other developer or worker running in a different environment. Should be a GitHub URL or relative cross-repo reference.
findings.remediation: Replace '~/dev/IFleet/SPRINT.md' with 'https://github.com/weautomatehq1/IFleet/blob/main/SPRINT.md' or similar.

findings.title: FILE_STRUCTURE.md 'Last verified' date is stale
findings.detail: FILE_STRUCTURE.md footer shows a 'Last verified' date from an earlier session. The structure has been accurate through the June sessions but the verification date should be current.
findings.remediation: Update 'Last verified' to 2026-06-27.

findings.title: FILE_STRUCTURE.md references docs/templates/ which may not exist
findings.detail: FILE_STRUCTURE.md lists 'docs/templates/' as part of the repo structure, but this directory may not actually exist or may have different contents than described.
findings.remediation: Verify docs/templates/ exists. If not, remove or mark as '(planned)' in the structure.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md '### Voice Discovery' should be repo-name cased
findings.detail: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md has a section header '### Voice Discovery' (two words, title-case). The repo is named 'voice-discovery' (lowercase-hyphen). Consistent naming prevents tools that search by repo name from missing content.
findings.remediation: Rename '### Voice Discovery' to '### voice-discovery'.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md '### Spec Template' should be repo-name cased
findings.detail: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md has a section header '### Spec Template' (two words, title-case). The repo is named 'spec-template' (lowercase-hyphen). Consistent naming prevents tools that search by repo name from missing content.
findings.remediation: Rename '### Spec Template' to '### spec-template'.

findings.title: STAKEHOLDERS.md 'Last verified' date is stale
findings.detail: STAKEHOLDERS.md footer 'Last verified' date predates the June 2026 sessions. After adding the ADR-0011 entry (see AUDIT-factory-c9377631), this date must also be updated.
findings.remediation: Update 'Last verified' to 2026-06-27.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter missing related_adrs entry for ADR-0004
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter has a related_adrs list. ADR-0004 (canonical routing alignment) is directly relevant to the architecture but is not listed in the frontmatter. Cross-reference completeness helps workers navigate the decision history.
findings.remediation: Add 'ADR-0004' to the related_adrs list in ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter.
